scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @kflow-academy/shared && npm run dev -w @kflow-academy/server
scripts.build:client: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @kflow-academy/client
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @kflow-academy/server
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:client && firebase deploy --only hosting:prod
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:client && firebase deploy --only hosting:dev
scripts.deploy:server: npm run build:server && firebase deploy --only apphosting
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:prod && npm run deploy:server
